title: Boat Froster
description: Makes the frost walker enchantment work while driving a boat
body:
# Boat Froster

Edits the frost walker enchantment so that it works while you are driving a boat. While in a boat frosted ice will not decay while you aren't moving, this does not apply when walking on water normally, however.

This datapack is also available in mod form for convenience, it functions exactly the same regardless of which one you use.
